title: File System Recursive Traversal

activities.name: fast_get_descendants(uuid)
activities.description: Returns ALL descendant UUIDs (any depth) via recursive SQL CTE
steps: Execute WITH RECURSIVE descendant_cte CTE: seed = fsentries WHERE parent_uid = uuid
UNION ALL: join fsentries ON f.parent_uid = d.uuid (expand level by level)
Map rows to plain uuid array

activities.name: fast_get_direct_descendants(uuid)
activities.description: Returns only direct child UUIDs (one level deep)
steps: [Branch] If uuid === PuterPath.NULL_UUID → SELECT uuid FROM fsentries WHERE parent_uid IS NULL
[Branch] Else → SELECT uuid FROM fsentries WHERE parent_uid = ?

activities.name: get_descendants_full(uuid, fetch_entry_options)
activities.description: Returns full fsentry objects for direct children, with subdomain join and deduplication
steps: Build columns SQL: defaultProperties (f.col) + subdomainProperties (s.col AS subdomain_*) + optional thumbnail
[Branch] If uuid === PuterPath.NULL_UUID → SELECT columns FROM fsentries WHERE parent_uid IS NULL
[Branch] Else → SELECT columns FROM fsentries AS f LEFT JOIN subdomains AS s ON f.id=s.root_dir_id WHERE parent_uid = ? ORDER BY f.id
Deduplicate rows by entry id using Map (collapse multiple subdomain rows into entry.subdomains[])

activities.name: get_recursive_size(uuid)
activities.description: Computes total size of all descendant files using recursive CTE
steps: Execute WITH RECURSIVE descendant_cte: seed = fsentries WHERE parent_uid = ? (includes size)
UNION ALL: expand all descendants with size
SELECT SUM(size) AS total_size FROM descendant_cte

activities.name: get_recursive_size({ node })
activities.description: Provider-level wrapper — duplicate CTE implementation operating on node
steps: Execute same recursive CTE as FSEntryController.get_recursive_size

activities.name: find(selector, fetch_entry_options)
activities.description: Dispatcher: resolves selector type and routes to appropriate lookup method
steps: Receive selector (RootNodeSelector | NodePathSelector | NodeUIDSelector | NodeInternalIDSelector | NodeChildSelector)
[Branch] RootNodeSelector → return selector.entry directly (no DB call)
[Sub-branch] parent is other → find(selector.parent) → parentEntry → findNameInParent(parentEntry.uuid, name) → id

activities.name: findByUID(uuid, fetch_entry_options)
activities.description: Looks up a single fsentry by UUID using tryHardRead (retries on failure)
steps: Build SELECT: defaultProperties + optional thumbnail FROM fsentries WHERE uuid = ? LIMIT 1

activities.name: findByPath(path, fetch_entry_options)
activities.description: Resolves path to fsentry — first tries direct path column, then iterative segment walk
steps: Receive path string, options { thumbnail, tracer, trace_options }
[Attempt 1] SELECT * FROM fsentries WHERE path=? LIMIT 1 → if found, return result[0]
[Attempt 2 - loop] For each path segment i:
[Branch] parent_uid === null → SELECT uuid FROM fsentries WHERE parent_uid IS NULL AND name=? LIMIT 1
[Branch] Else → SELECT (cols or uuid) FROM fsentries WHERE parent_uid=? AND name=? LIMIT 1
[Optional] Wrap loop in tracer span 'fs:sql:findByPath' if tracer provided

activities.name: readdirstat_uuid({ uuid, options })
activities.description: Optimized readdir for known UUID — wraps get_descendants_full
steps: Map each raw_entry → svc_fs.node(new NodeRawEntrySelector(raw_entry, { found_thumbnail }))

key_conditions: uuid === PuterPath.NULL_UUID → query parent_uid IS NULL (root-level entries)
selector type determines routing in find(): Root / Path / UID / InternalID / Child
NodeChildSelector.parent is RootNodeSelector → findNameInRoot, else recursive find(parent)
Direct path column hit in findByPath → skip segment loop
fetch_entry_options.thumbnail → appends thumbnail column to SELECT
fetch_entry_options.tracer → wraps path loop in OpenTelemetry span
key_relationships: FSEntryController uses PuterPath.NULL_UUID for root detection
FSEntryController uses NodeUIDSelector, NodePathSelector, NodeInternalIDSelector, NodeChildSelector, RootNodeSelector
PuterFSProvider.quick_check delegates to FSEntryController.findByPath / findByUID / nameExistsUnderParent
PuterFSProvider.rmdir uses fast_get_direct_descendants to check if directory is empty
FSEntryController.find recursively calls itself for NodeChildSelector parent resolution
db_operations: db.tryHardRead() — retrying read (used in findByUID, findByID for resilience)
db.batch_write() — batch write operations (used in exec_ for write queue)
All traversal uses SQL WITH RECURSIVE CTE (descendant_cte) pattern
important_notes: Two implementations of get_recursive_size exist: one in FSEntryController (pure, uuid param) and one in PuterFSProvider (node param, extracts uid then runs same CTE). get_descendants_full only gets DIRECT children (no recursion) — name is slightly misleading. fast_get_descendants is truly recursive (all depths, UUIDs only). findByPath has a fast-path using a denormalized 'path' column before falling back to segment-by-segment traversal.
